feedback.technicalIssues: It took almost 5 minutes for each game to finally load and start. Sometimes it took so long I forgot the directions. Very poor
feedback.confusingParts: Some of the directions didn't make sense, but again it took so long to get the games working, I forgot what to do.
feedback.suggestions: Figure out how to get the games to load quicker and easier.
feedback.funCriteria: If I could actually do it.
